I worked in hex (each 4-bit group is one hex digit) and checked each round in the order requested: first `S1/ch/S0/maj`, then the additions `step1/step2/step3/temp1/temp2/new a/new e`, then the register shift into the next round.

Examples of the checks:

- Round 0: from `e=510e527f`, `Σ1(e)=3587272b`, matching L0070; `ch=1f85c98c`, matching L0071. The sums then check: `h+S1=9167f444` (L0072), `+ch=b0edbdd0` (L0073), `+K[0]=f377ed68` (L0074), `+W[0]=62b86bb5` (L0075), `Σ0(a)=ce20b47e` and `maj=3a6fe667` (L0076-L0077), `temp2=08909ae5` (L0078), giving `new a=6b49069a` and `new e=080860ef` (L0079-L0080). The shift in L0081 matches those outputs and the old registers.
- I repeated that same check round-by-round. The round blocks L0082-L0095, L0096-L0109, L0110-L0123, L0124-L0137, L0138-L0151, L0152-L0165, L0166-L0179, L0180-L0193, L0194-L0207, L0208-L0221, L0222-L0235, L0236-L0249, L0250-L0263, L0264-L0277, L0278-L0291, L0292-L0305, L0306-L0319, L0320-L0333, L0334-L0347, L0348-L0361, L0362-L0375, L0376-L0389, L0390-L0403, L0404-L0417, L0418-L0431, L0432-L0445, L0446-L0459, L0460-L0473, L0474-L0487, L0488-L0501, L0502-L0515, L0516-L0529, L0530-L0543, L0544-L0557, L0558-L0571, L0572-L0585, L0586-L0599, L0600-L0613, L0614-L0627, L0628-L0641, L0642-L0655, L0656-L0669, L0670-L0683, L0684-L0697, L0698-L0711, L0712-L0725, L0726-L0739, L0740-L0753, L0754-L0767, L0768-L0781, L0782-L0795, L0796-L0809, L0810-L0823, L0824-L0837, L0838-L0851, L0852-L0865, L0866-L0879, L0880-L0893, L0894-L0907, L0908-L0921, L0922-L0935, L0936-L0949, and L0950-L0963 all checked out internally.
- A late-round spot check: in round 63, `Σ1(4105c974)=7d688dbc`, matching L0952; `ch(4105c974,9e6cefd9,6c83dda4)=2c86ddd0`, matching L0953; `Σ0(9563db39)=33f8bb85`, matching L0958; and `maj(9563db39,34ea10f7,b2e3d0fa)=b4e3d0fb`, matching L0959. The additions L0954-L0962 also match exactly.
- Finally, adding the final working variables from L0961-L0963 back to the standard SHA-256 IV gives the digest in L0964; for example `6a09e667 + 6a93a923 = d49d8f8a`, and the other seven words match likewise.

VERDICT: GENUINE
ROUND: NONE
REASONING: I checked the small operations before their dependent sums in every round from L0068-L0963, verified the shifts between rounds, and confirmed the final IV-addition gives L0964; no first mismatch or single-bit tamper point was found.
